scripts.test:ios:ui: cd ios && ./generate.sh && xcodebuild test -project Cowtail.xcodeproj -scheme Cowtail -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro,OS=26.4.1' -only-testing:CowtailUITests
scripts.lint:ts: oxlint web/src web/convex web/vite.config.ts cli/src cli/tests protocol/src realtime/src openclaw-plugin/src
scripts.lint:ts:fix: oxlint --fix web/src web/convex web/vite.config.ts cli/src cli/tests protocol/src realtime/src openclaw-plugin/src
scripts.fmt:ts: oxfmt --write web/src web/convex web/vite.config.ts cli/src cli/tests protocol/src realtime/src openclaw-plugin/src
scripts.fmt:ts:check: oxfmt --check web/src web/convex web/vite.config.ts cli/src cli/tests protocol/src realtime/src openclaw-plugin/src
